case_title: JOLLY, ANGELA L. VS THE DRUG STORE (GOLDFARB, LYNNORE)

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-20-2004, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO FEB-23-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION ***-**-****, OFF CALENDAR PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO 50% OF PROCEEDS FROM SALE OF DINING SET STORED IN DEFT'S GARAGE.
MEDIATED SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $519.50. CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED
WITH PREJUDICE AND THE COURT'S PRIOR 03-28-05 ORDER WILL BE VACATED AT THAT TIME.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOLLY, ANGELA L.
